title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at MyGlamm - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at MyGlamm - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MyGlamm! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MyGlamm:
MyGlamm is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MyGlamm!
